LanguageData.ELIFMH-6LBAttack.label: AH-6M Little Bird (Attack)
LanguageData.ELIFMH-6LBAttack.description: DESCRIPTION: The AH-6M is a helicopter designed for small range attack runs, sacrificing storage, passenger and fuel capacity to maintain the same speed of its counterpart. BASIC STATS: Health: 600 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 350kg Speed: 5 Passenger Capacity: 1-2 Fuel Per Tile: 5 Fuel Capacity: 250 Round Trip Range: 25 Full Range: 50 Internal Power: 250w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: 2 Precision Run Capacity: 1 Spread: 5 Distance between drops: 3
